1→# Terminal card renderer with progressive degradation
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→`bop status --watch` and `bop list` show cards as flat text rows. The goal is
     6→a rich, demoscene-inspired ANSI card layout that degrades gracefully across
     7→terminal capabilities — from a dumb SSH pipe to a full truecolor Zellij pane.
     8→vibe-kanban (already integrated via `vibekanban/`) showed that column-based
     9→card layouts are more scannable than flat lists; bop's CLI should match that
    10→quality natively without requiring a separate TUI process.
    11→
    12→## Capability detection
    13→
    14→Add `crates/bop-cli/src/termcaps.rs`:
    15→
    16→```rust
    17→#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord)]
    18→pub enum TermLevel {
    19→    Dumb,       // TERM=dumb or unset; no color, ASCII only
    20→    Basic,      // 8-color ANSI; ASCII borders
    21→    Extended,   // 16-color; box-drawing (single line); unicode blocks
    22→    Full,       // 256-color; block shading ░▒▓; full BMP unicode
    23→    TrueColor,  // 24-bit RGB; double-line box ╔═╗; playing-card tokens
    24→}
    25→
    26→pub struct TermCaps {
    27→    pub level: TermLevel,
    28→    pub width: u16,
    29→    pub two_column: bool,   // width >= 100
    30→}
    31→
    32→impl TermCaps {
    33→    pub fn detect() -> Self {
    34→        let level = Self::detect_level();
    35→        let width = terminal_size().map(|(w, _)| w.0).unwrap_or(80);
    36→        TermCaps { level, width, two_column: width >= 100 }
    37→    }
    38→
    39→    fn detect_level() -> TermLevel {
    40→        // Zellij always supports Full
    41→        if std::env::var("ZELLIJ").is_ok() {
    42→            return TermLevel::Full;
    43→        }
    44→        let colorterm = std::env::var("COLORTERM").unwrap_or_default();
    45→        if colorterm == "truecolor" || colorterm == "24bit" {
    46→            return TermLevel::TrueColor;
    47→        }
    48→        let term = std::env::var("TERM").unwrap_or_default();
    49→        if term.contains("256color") {
    50→            return TermLevel::Full;
    51→        }
    52→        if term.starts_with("xterm") || term.starts_with("screen")
    53→            || term.starts_with("tmux") || term.starts_with("rxvt") {
    54→            return TermLevel::Extended;
    55→        }
    56→        if term == "dumb" || term.is_empty() {
    57→            return TermLevel::Dumb;
    58→        }
    59→        TermLevel::Basic
    60→    }
    61→}
    62→```
    63→
    64→`terminal_size` crate (already in Rust ecosystem, MIT, ~2KB). Re-query on
    65→every render — never cache (supports `bop status --watch` resize handling,
    66→spec 025 requirement).
    67→
    68→## Card rendering — four layouts
    69→
    70→All layouts use the same data from `Meta` + optional `implementation_plan.json`
    71→(spec 027). The renderer selects the layout from `TermCaps.level`.
    72→
    73→---
    74→
    75→### Level 0 — Dumb (no color, ASCII only)
    76→
    77→```
    78→=== RUNNING (2) ===
    79→[>] my-feature     claude   2m14s  67%
    80→[>] bugfix-auth    codex    0m43s  22%
    81→
    82→--- PENDING (3) ---
    83→[ ] docs-update
    84→[ ] refactor-api
    85→[ ] add-tests
    86→
    87→--- DONE / FAILED ---
    88→[x] perf-improvements   4m02s
    89→[!] broken-card         exit 1
    90→
    91→14 total | 92% success | avg 3m44s
    92→```
    93→
    94→---
    95→
    96→### Level 1 — Basic (8-color, ASCII borders)
    97→
    98→```
    99→+-- RUNNING (2) ------------------------------------------+
   100→| [>] my-feature     claude   2m14s  [========  ] 67%     |
   101→| [>] bugfix-auth    codex    0m43s  [===       ] 22%     |
   102→+---------------------------------------------------------+
   103→```
   104→
   105→---
   106→
   107→### Level 2 — Extended (16-color, single-line box drawing)
   108→
   109→Left-accent stripe `▌` (U+258C) per card row, state color:
   110→
   111→```
   112→┌─ ⚙ RUNNING ──────────────────────────────────────────┐
   113→│▌ my-feature          claude      2m 14s               │
   114→│  ████████████░░░░ 67%   Phase 2: Network  ◑           │
   115→│                                                        │
   116→│▌ bugfix-auth         codex       0m 43s               │
   117→│  ████░░░░░░░░░░ 22%   Phase 1: Core  ◔                │
   118→└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
   119→
   120→┌─ · PENDING ───────┐  ┌─ ✓ DONE · ✗ FAILED ───────────┐
   121→│  · docs-update    │  │  ✓ perf-improvements  4m 02s   │
   122→│  · refactor-api   │  │  ✗ broken-card  exit 1         │
   123→│  · add-tests      │  └────────────────────────────────┘
   124→└───────────────────┘
   125→```
   126→
   127→---
   128→
   129→### Level 3 — Full (256-color, demoscene block headers)
   130→
   131→Section headers use the dithered fade pattern — classic BBS/ANSI art style:
   132→
   133→```
   134→░▒▓ ⚙ RUNNING (2) ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   135→
   136→▌ ⚀ my-feature          claude      2m 14s
   137→▌   ████████████░░░░ 67%    Phase 2: Network layer   ◑
   138→
   139→▌ ⚁ bugfix-auth          codex       0m 43s
   140→▌   ████░░░░░░░░░░ 22%    Phase 1: Core impl         ◔
   141→
   142→░▒▓ · PENDING ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   143→
   144→  · docs-update
   145→  · refactor-api
   146→  · add-tests
   147→
   148→░▒▓ ✓ DONE · ✗ FAILED ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   149→
   150→  ✓ perf-improvements                              4m 02s
   151→  ✗ broken-card                 failed              exit 1
   152→
   153→░▒▓▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   154→  14 total · success rate 92% · avg 3m 44s
   155→```
   156→
   157→Section header construction:
   158→```
   159→░▒▓ {LABEL} ▓▒░{░ × (width - label_len - 6)}
   160→```
   161→
   162→Left-accent `▌` is printed in state color (amber=running, green=done,
   163→red=failed, blue=pending, dim=merged). The dice glyph `⚀⚁⚂⚃⚄⚅` encodes
   164→card priority (P1–P6), BMP-safe.
   165→
   166→Progress bar: 16-cell `████░░░░` (filled = `\u{2588}`, empty = `\u{2591}`).
   167→
   168→---
   169→
   170→### Level 4 — TrueColor (double-line box, column layout)
   171→
   172→At `width >= 100`, two-column layout. Below 100, single-column with double box:
   173→
   174→```
   175→╔═ ⚙ RUNNING (2) ═══════════════════╗  ╔═ · PENDING (3) ════════════════════╗
   176→║ ⚀ my-feature    claude   2m 14s  ║  ║  · docs-update                     ║
   177→║   ████████░░ 67%  Ph2  ◑         ║  ║  · refactor-api                    ║
   178→╠══════════════════════════════════╣  ║  · add-tests                       ║
   179→║ ⚁ bugfix-auth   codex    0m 43s  ║  ╚════════════════════════════════════╝
   180→║   ████░░░░░░ 22%  Ph1  ◔         ║
   181→╚══════════════════════════════════╝  ╔═ ✓ DONE · ✗ FAILED ════════════════╗
   182→                                      ║ ✓ perf-improvements     4m 02s     ║
   183→                                      ║ ✗ broken-card   failed   exit 1    ║
   184→                                      ╚════════════════════════════════════╝
   185→```
   186→
   187→Double-line box chars (all BMP):
   188→- `╔ ═ ╗ ║ ╠ ╣ ╚ ╝` — corners, horizontals, verticals, T-joints
   189→- `╭ ─ ╮ │ ╰ ╯` — rounded single-line for card separators within a box
   190→
   191→Progress bar at TrueColor uses RGB gradient fill — amber→green as percent
   192→rises — via `\x1b[38;2;R;G;Bm█\x1b[0m` per cell. Falls back to fixed amber
   193→block at Full/Extended.
   194→
   195→---
   196→
   197→## Implementation structure
   198→
   199→```
   200→crates/bop-cli/src/
   201→  termcaps.rs      — TermLevel detection, TermCaps struct
   202→  render/
   203→    mod.rs         — CardRenderer trait, dispatch by TermLevel
   204→    dumb.rs        — Level 0
   205→    basic.rs       — Level 1
   206→    extended.rs    — Level 2
   207→    full.rs        — Level 3 (demoscene headers)
   208→    truecolor.rs   — Level 4 (double box, RGB gradient)
   209→```
   210→
   211→`CardRenderer` trait:
   212→
   213→```rust
   214→pub trait CardRenderer {
   215→    fn render_section_header(&self, label: &str, count: usize) -> String;
   216→    fn render_card_row(&self, card: &CardView) -> String;
   217→    fn render_progress(&self, pct: u8, phase: Option<&str>, phase_frac: f32) -> String;
   218→    fn render_footer(&self, stats: &Stats) -> String;
   219→}
   220→```
   221→
   222→`CardView` is a flat view struct built from `Meta` + optional AC plan data
   223→(spec 027). The renderer does not read files — the caller assembles `CardView`.
   224→
   225→## vibe-kanban provider update
   226→
   227→Update `vibekanban/_bop_provider_impl.py` to pass additional fields in each
   228→task object so vibe-kanban's card face gets the same data:
   229→
   230→```python
   231→tasks.append({
   232→    "id":           ...,
   233→    "title":        ...,
   234→    "status":       ...,
   235→    "priority":     meta.get("priority", "P4"),
   236→    "provider":     meta.get("provider", ""),
   237→    "elapsed_s":    elapsed_seconds(meta),
   238→    "progress":     meta.get("progress"),
   239→    "ac_spec_id":   meta.get("ac_spec_id"),
   240→})
   241→```
   242→
   243→## Acceptance
   244→
   245→- `TermCaps::detect()` correctly classifies Dumb / Basic / Extended / Full / TrueColor
   246→- Terminal width re-queried on every render (not cached)
   247→- Level 3 section headers use `░▒▓ LABEL ▓▒░░░` fill to terminal width
   248→- Level 3 left-accent `▌` renders in state color
   249→- Level 4 two-column layout activates at width ≥ 100
   250→- Level 4 progress bar uses RGB gradient (amber→green)
   251→- All glyphs used are BMP (U+0000–U+FFFF); SMP card glyphs only if `glyph` field present and level ≥ Full
   252→- Graceful fallback: if detection fails, defaults to Extended
   253→- `make check` passes
   254→- `output/result.md` with ASCII screenshots of all four levels
   255→

Subtask 1-1 is complete. Here's what was done:

**Changes made:**

1. **`crates/bop-cli/Cargo.toml`** — Added `terminal_size = "0.4"` dependency

2. **`crates/bop-cli/src/termcaps.rs`** (new file) — Terminal capability detection module:
   - `TermLevel` enum: `Dumb < Basic < Extended < Full < TrueColor` (derives `PartialOrd`, `Ord`)
   - `TermCaps` struct: `level`, `width` (u16), `two_column` (bool, true when width ≥ 100)
   - `TermCaps::detect()`: queries terminal width via `terminal_size` crate on every call (never cached), falls back to 80
   - `classify_level()`: pure function extracted for testability — detection order: ZELLIJ→Full, COLORTERM truecolor/24bit→TrueColor, TERM 256color→Full, xterm/screen/tmux/rxvt→Extended, dumb/empty→Dumb, otherwise→Basic
   - **18 unit tests** covering all detection paths, priority ordering, and two-column threshold

3. **`crates/bop-cli/src/main.rs`** — Registered `mod termcaps;`

**Verification:** All 18 tests pass, no clippy errors. Committed as `5250aad`.

entries.detail:
1→# Terminal card renderer with progressive degradation
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→`bop status --watch` and `bop list` show cards as flat text rows. The goal is
     6→a rich, demoscene-inspired ANSI card layout that degrades gracefully across
     7→terminal capabilities — from a dumb SSH pipe to a full truecolor Zellij pane.
     8→vibe-kanban (already integrated via `vibekanban/`) showed that column-based
     9→card layouts are more scannable than flat lists; bop's CLI should match that
    10→quality natively without requiring a separate TUI process.
    11→
    12→## Capability detection
    13→
    14→Add `crates/bop-cli/src/termcaps.rs`:
    15→
    16→```rust
    17→#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord)]
    18→pub enum TermLevel {
    19→    Dumb,       // TERM=dumb or unset; no color, ASCII only
    20→    Basic,      // 8-color ANSI; ASCII borders
    21→    Extended,   // 16-color; box-drawing (single line); unicode blocks
    22→    Full,       // 256-color; block shading ░▒▓; full BMP unicode
    23→    TrueColor,  // 24-bit RGB; double-line box ╔═╗; playing-card tokens
    24→}
    25→
    26→pub struct TermCaps {
    27→    pub level: TermLevel,
    28→    pub width: u16,
    29→    pub two_column: bool,   // width >= 100
    30→}
    31→
    32→impl TermCaps {
    33→    pub fn detect() -> Self {
    34→        let level = Self::detect_level();
    35→        let width = terminal_size().map(|(w, _)| w.0).unwrap_or(80);
    36→        TermCaps { level, width, two_column: width >= 100 }
    37→    }
    38→
    39→    fn detect_level() -> TermLevel {
    40→        // Zellij always supports Full
    41→        if std::env::var("ZELLIJ").is_ok() {
    42→            return TermLevel::Full;
    43→        }
    44→        let colorterm = std::env::var("COLORTERM").unwrap_or_default();
    45→        if colorterm == "truecolor" || colorterm == "24bit" {
    46→            return TermLevel::TrueColor;
    47→        }
    48→        let term = std::env::var("TERM").unwrap_or_default();
    49→        if term.contains("256color") {
    50→            return TermLevel::Full;
    51→        }
    52→        if term.starts_with("xterm") || term.starts_with("screen")
    53→            || term.starts_with("tmux") || term.starts_with("rxvt") {
    54→            return TermLevel::Extended;
    55→        }
    56→        if term == "dumb" || term.is_empty() {
    57→            return TermLevel::Dumb;
    58→        }
    59→        TermLevel::Basic
    60→    }
    61→}
    62→```
    63→
    64→`terminal_size` crate (already in Rust ecosystem, MIT, ~2KB). Re-query on
    65→every render — never cache (supports `bop status --watch` resize handling,
    66→spec 025 requirement).
    67→
    68→## Card rendering — four layouts
    69→
    70→All layouts use the same data from `Meta` + optional `implementation_plan.json`
    71→(spec 027). The renderer selects the layout from `TermCaps.level`.
    72→
    73→---
    74→
    75→### Level 0 — Dumb (no color, ASCII only)
    76→
    77→```
    78→=== RUNNING (2) ===
    79→[>] my-feature     claude   2m14s  67%
    80→[>] bugfix-auth    codex    0m43s  22%
    81→
    82→--- PENDING (3) ---
    83→[ ] docs-update
    84→[ ] refactor-api
    85→[ ] add-tests
    86→
    87→--- DONE / FAILED ---
    88→[x] perf-improvements   4m02s
    89→[!] broken-card         exit 1
    90→
    91→14 total | 92% success | avg 3m44s
    92→```
    93→
    94→---
    95→
    96→### Level 1 — Basic (8-color, ASCII borders)
    97→
    98→```
    99→+-- RUNNING (2) ------------------------------------------+
   100→| [>] my-feature     claude   2m14s  [========  ] 67%     |
   101→| [>] bugfix-auth    codex    0m43s  [===       ] 22%     |
   102→+---------------------------------------------------------+
   103→```
   104→
   105→---
   106→
   107→### Level 2 — Extended (16-color, single-line box drawing)
   108→
   109→Left-accent stripe `▌` (U+258C) per card row, state color:
   110→
   111→```
   112→┌─ ⚙ RUNNING ──────────────────────────────────────────┐
   113→│▌ my-feature          claude      2m 14s               │
   114→│  ████████████░░░░ 67%   Phase 2: Network  ◑           │
   115→│                                                        │
   116→│▌ bugfix-auth         codex       0m 43s               │
   117→│  ████░░░░░░░░░░ 22%   Phase 1: Core  ◔                │
   118→└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
   119→
   120→┌─ · PENDING ───────┐  ┌─ ✓ DONE · ✗ FAILED ───────────┐
   121→│  · docs-update    │  │  ✓ perf-improvements  4m 02s   │
   122→│  · refactor-api   │  │  ✗ broken-card  exit 1         │
   123→│  · add-tests      │  └────────────────────────────────┘
   124→└───────────────────┘
   125→```
   126→
   127→---
   128→
   129→### Level 3 — Full (256-color, demoscene block headers)
   130→
   131→Section headers use the dithered fade pattern — classic BBS/ANSI art style:
   132→
   133→```
   134→░▒▓ ⚙ RUNNING (2) ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   135→
   136→▌ ⚀ my-feature          claude      2m 14s
   137→▌   ████████████░░░░ 67%    Phase 2: Network layer   ◑
   138→
   139→▌ ⚁ bugfix-auth          codex       0m 43s
   140→▌   ████░░░░░░░░░░ 22%    Phase 1: Core impl         ◔
   141→
   142→░▒▓ · PENDING ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   143→
   144→  · docs-update
   145→  · refactor-api
   146→  · add-tests
   147→
   148→░▒▓ ✓ DONE · ✗ FAILED ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   149→
   150→  ✓ perf-improvements                              4m 02s
   151→  ✗ broken-card                 failed              exit 1
   152→
   153→░▒▓▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   154→  14 total · success rate 92% · avg 3m 44s
   155→```
   156→
   157→Section header construction:
   158→```
   159→░▒▓ {LABEL} ▓▒░{░ × (width - label_len - 6)}
   160→```
   161→
   162→Left-accent `▌` is printed in state color (amber=running, green=done,
   163→red=failed, blue=pending, dim=merged). The dice glyph `⚀⚁⚂⚃⚄⚅` encodes
   164→card priority (P1–P6), BMP-safe.
   165→
   166→Progress bar: 16-cell `████░░░░` (filled = `\u{2588}`, empty = `\u{2591}`).
   167→
   168→---
   169→
   170→### Level 4 — TrueColor (double-line box, column layout)
   171→
   172→At `width >= 100`, two-column layout. Below 100, single-column with double box:
   173→
   174→```
   175→╔═ ⚙ RUNNING (2) ═══════════════════╗  ╔═ · PENDING (3) ════════════════════╗
   176→║ ⚀ my-feature    claude   2m 14s  ║  ║  · docs-update                     ║
   177→║   ████████░░ 67%  Ph2  ◑         ║  ║  · refactor-api                    ║
   178→╠══════════════════════════════════╣  ║  · add-tests                       ║
   179→║ ⚁ bugfix-auth   codex    0m 43s  ║  ╚════════════════════════════════════╝
   180→║   ████░░░░░░ 22%  Ph1  ◔         ║
   181→╚══════════════════════════════════╝  ╔═ ✓ DONE · ✗ FAILED ════════════════╗
   182→                                      ║ ✓ perf-improvements     4m 02s     ║
   183→                                      ║ ✗ broken-card   failed   exit 1    ║
   184→                                      ╚════════════════════════════════════╝
   185→```
   186→
   187→Double-line box chars (all BMP):
   188→- `╔ ═ ╗ ║ ╠ ╣ ╚ ╝` — corners, horizontals, verticals, T-joints
   189→- `╭ ─ ╮ │ ╰ ╯` — rounded single-line for card separators within a box
   190→
   191→Progress bar at TrueColor uses RGB gradient fill — amber→green as percent
   192→rises — via `\x1b[38;2;R;G;Bm█\x1b[0m` per cell. Falls back to fixed amber
   193→block at Full/Extended.
   194→
   195→---
   196→
   197→## Implementation structure
   198→
   199→```
   200→crates/bop-cli/src/
   201→  termcaps.rs      — TermLevel detection, TermCaps struct
   202→  render/
   203→    mod.rs         — CardRenderer trait, dispatch by TermLevel
   204→    dumb.rs        — Level 0
   205→    basic.rs       — Level 1
   206→    extended.rs    — Level 2
   207→    full.rs        — Level 3 (demoscene headers)
   208→    truecolor.rs   — Level 4 (double box, RGB gradient)
   209→```
   210→
   211→`CardRenderer` trait:
   212→
   213→```rust
   214→pub trait CardRenderer {
   215→    fn render_section_header(&self, label: &str, count: usize) -> String;
   216→    fn render_card_row(&self, card: &CardView) -> String;
   217→    fn render_progress(&self, pct: u8, phase: Option<&str>, phase_frac: f32) -> String;
   218→    fn render_footer(&self, stats: &Stats) -> String;
   219→}
   220→```
   221→
   222→`CardView` is a flat view struct built from `Meta` + optional AC plan data
   223→(spec 027). The renderer does not read files — the caller assembles `CardView`.
   224→
   225→## vibe-kanban provider update
   226→
   227→Update `vibekanban/_bop_provider_impl.py` to pass additional fields in each
   228→task object so vibe-kanban's card face gets the same data:
   229→
   230→```python
   231→tasks.append({
   232→    "id":           ...,
   233→    "title":        ...,
   234→    "status":       ...,
   235→    "priority":     meta.get("priority", "P4"),
   236→    "provider":     meta.get("provider", ""),
   237→    "elapsed_s":    elapsed_seconds(meta),
   238→    "progress":     meta.get("progress"),
   239→    "ac_spec_id":   meta.get("ac_spec_id"),
   240→})
   241→```
   242→
   243→## Acceptance
   244→
   245→- `TermCaps::detect()` correctly classifies Dumb / Basic / Extended / Full / TrueColor
   246→- Terminal width re-queried on every render (not cached)
   247→- Level 3 section headers use `░▒▓ LABEL ▓▒░░░` fill to terminal width
   248→- Level 3 left-accent `▌` renders in state color
   249→- Level 4 two-column layout activates at width ≥ 100
   250→- Level 4 progress bar uses RGB gradient (amber→green)
   251→- All glyphs used are BMP (U+0000–U+FFFF); SMP card glyphs only if `glyph` field present and level ≥ Full
   252→- Graceful fallback: if detection fails, defaults to Extended
   253→- `make check` passes
   254→- `output/result.md` with ASCII screenshots of all four levels
   255→

entries.detail:
1→# Terminal card renderer with progressive degradation
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→`bop status --watch` and `bop list` show cards as flat text rows. The goal is
     6→a rich, demoscene-inspired ANSI card layout that degrades gracefully across
     7→terminal capabilities — from a dumb SSH pipe to a full truecolor Zellij pane.
     8→vibe-kanban (already integrated via `vibekanban/`) showed that column-based
     9→card layouts are more scannable than flat lists; bop's CLI should match that
    10→quality natively without requiring a separate TUI process.
    11→
    12→## Capability detection
    13→
    14→Add `crates/bop-cli/src/termcaps.rs`:
    15→
    16→```rust
    17→#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord)]
    18→pub enum TermLevel {
    19→    Dumb,       // TERM=dumb or unset; no color, ASCII only
    20→    Basic,      // 8-color ANSI; ASCII borders
    21→    Extended,   // 16-color; box-drawing (single line); unicode blocks
    22→    Full,       // 256-color; block shading ░▒▓; full BMP unicode
    23→    TrueColor,  // 24-bit RGB; double-line box ╔═╗; playing-card tokens
    24→}
    25→
    26→pub struct TermCaps {
    27→    pub level: TermLevel,
    28→    pub width: u16,
    29→    pub two_column: bool,   // width >= 100
    30→}
    31→
    32→impl TermCaps {
    33→    pub fn detect() -> Self {
    34→        let level = Self::detect_level();
    35→        let width = terminal_size().map(|(w, _)| w.0).unwrap_or(80);
    36→        TermCaps { level, width, two_column: width >= 100 }
    37→    }
    38→
    39→    fn detect_level() -> TermLevel {
    40→        // Zellij always supports Full
    41→        if std::env::var("ZELLIJ").is_ok() {
    42→            return TermLevel::Full;
    43→        }
    44→        let colorterm = std::env::var("COLORTERM").unwrap_or_default();
    45→        if colorterm == "truecolor" || colorterm == "24bit" {
    46→            return TermLevel::TrueColor;
    47→        }
    48→        let term = std::env::var("TERM").unwrap_or_default();
    49→        if term.contains("256color") {
    50→            return TermLevel::Full;
    51→        }
    52→        if term.starts_with("xterm") || term.starts_with("screen")
    53→            || term.starts_with("tmux") || term.starts_with("rxvt") {
    54→            return TermLevel::Extended;
    55→        }
    56→        if term == "dumb" || term.is_empty() {
    57→            return TermLevel::Dumb;
    58→        }
    59→        TermLevel::Basic
    60→    }
    61→}
    62→```
    63→
    64→`terminal_size` crate (already in Rust ecosystem, MIT, ~2KB). Re-query on
    65→every render — never cache (supports `bop status --watch` resize handling,
    66→spec 025 requirement).
    67→
    68→## Card rendering — four layouts
    69→
    70→All layouts use the same data from `Meta` + optional `implementation_plan.json`
    71→(spec 027). The renderer selects the layout from `TermCaps.level`.
    72→
    73→---
    74→
    75→### Level 0 — Dumb (no color, ASCII only)
    76→
    77→```
    78→=== RUNNING (2) ===
    79→[>] my-feature     claude   2m14s  67%
    80→[>] bugfix-auth    codex    0m43s  22%
    81→
    82→--- PENDING (3) ---
    83→[ ] docs-update
    84→[ ] refactor-api
    85→[ ] add-tests
    86→
    87→--- DONE / FAILED ---
    88→[x] perf-improvements   4m02s
    89→[!] broken-card         exit 1
    90→
    91→14 total | 92% success | avg 3m44s
    92→```
    93→
    94→---
    95→
    96→### Level 1 — Basic (8-color, ASCII borders)
    97→
    98→```
    99→+-- RUNNING (2) ------------------------------------------+
   100→| [>] my-feature     claude   2m14s  [========  ] 67%     |
   101→| [>] bugfix-auth    codex    0m43s  [===       ] 22%     |
   102→+---------------------------------------------------------+
   103→```
   104→
   105→---
   106→
   107→### Level 2 — Extended (16-color, single-line box drawing)
   108→
   109→Left-accent stripe `▌` (U+258C) per card row, state color:
   110→
   111→```
   112→┌─ ⚙ RUNNING ──────────────────────────────────────────┐
   113→│▌ my-feature          claude      2m 14s               │
   114→│  ████████████░░░░ 67%   Phase 2: Network  ◑           │
   115→│                                                        │
   116→│▌ bugfix-auth         codex       0m 43s               │
   117→│  ████░░░░░░░░░░ 22%   Phase 1: Core  ◔                │
   118→└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
   119→
   120→┌─ · PENDING ───────┐  ┌─ ✓ DONE · ✗ FAILED ───────────┐
   121→│  · docs-update    │  │  ✓ perf-improvements  4m 02s   │
   122→│  · refactor-api   │  │  ✗ broken-card  exit 1         │
   123→│  · add-tests      │  └────────────────────────────────┘
   124→└───────────────────┘
   125→```
   126→
   127→---
   128→
   129→### Level 3 — Full (256-color, demoscene block headers)
   130→
   131→Section headers use the dithered fade pattern — classic BBS/ANSI art style:
   132→
   133→```
   134→░▒▓ ⚙ RUNNING (2) ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   135→
   136→▌ ⚀ my-feature          claude      2m 14s
   137→▌   ████████████░░░░ 67%    Phase 2: Network layer   ◑
   138→
   139→▌ ⚁ bugfix-auth          codex       0m 43s
   140→▌   ████░░░░░░░░░░ 22%    Phase 1: Core impl         ◔
   141→
   142→░▒▓ · PENDING ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   143→
   144→  · docs-update
   145→  · refactor-api
   146→  · add-tests
   147→
   148→░▒▓ ✓ DONE · ✗ FAILED ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   149→
   150→  ✓ perf-improvements                              4m 02s
   151→  ✗ broken-card                 failed              exit 1
   152→
   153→░▒▓▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   154→  14 total · success rate 92% · avg 3m 44s
   155→```
   156→
   157→Section header construction:
   158→```
   159→░▒▓ {LABEL} ▓▒░{░ × (width - label_len - 6)}
   160→```
   161→
   162→Left-accent `▌` is printed in state color (amber=running, green=done,
   163→red=failed, blue=pending, dim=merged). The dice glyph `⚀⚁⚂⚃⚄⚅` encodes
   164→card priority (P1–P6), BMP-safe.
   165→
   166→Progress bar: 16-cell `████░░░░` (filled = `\u{2588}`, empty = `\u{2591}`).
   167→
   168→---
   169→
   170→### Level 4 — TrueColor (double-line box, column layout)
   171→
   172→At `width >= 100`, two-column layout. Below 100, single-column with double box:
   173→
   174→```
   175→╔═ ⚙ RUNNING (2) ═══════════════════╗  ╔═ · PENDING (3) ════════════════════╗
   176→║ ⚀ my-feature    claude   2m 14s  ║  ║  · docs-update                     ║
   177→║   ████████░░ 67%  Ph2  ◑         ║  ║  · refactor-api                    ║
   178→╠══════════════════════════════════╣  ║  · add-tests                       ║
   179→║ ⚁ bugfix-auth   codex    0m 43s  ║  ╚════════════════════════════════════╝
   180→║   ████░░░░░░ 22%  Ph1  ◔         ║
   181→╚══════════════════════════════════╝  ╔═ ✓ DONE · ✗ FAILED ════════════════╗
   182→                                      ║ ✓ perf-improvements     4m 02s     ║
   183→                                      ║ ✗ broken-card   failed   exit 1    ║
   184→                                      ╚════════════════════════════════════╝
   185→```
   186→
   187→Double-line box chars (all BMP):
   188→- `╔ ═ ╗ ║ ╠ ╣ ╚ ╝` — corners, horizontals, verticals, T-joints
   189→- `╭ ─ ╮ │ ╰ ╯` — rounded single-line for card separators within a box
   190→
   191→Progress bar at TrueColor uses RGB gradient fill — amber→green as percent
   192→rises — via `\x1b[38;2;R;G;Bm█\x1b[0m` per cell. Falls back to fixed amber
   193→block at Full/Extended.
   194→
   195→---
   196→
   197→## Implementation structure
   198→
   199→```
   200→crates/bop-cli/src/
   201→  termcaps.rs      — TermLevel detection, TermCaps struct
   202→  render/
   203→    mod.rs         — CardRenderer trait, dispatch by TermLevel
   204→    dumb.rs        — Level 0
   205→    basic.rs       — Level 1
   206→    extended.rs    — Level 2
   207→    full.rs        — Level 3 (demoscene headers)
   208→    truecolor.rs   — Level 4 (double box, RGB gradient)
   209→```
   210→
   211→`CardRenderer` trait:
   212→
   213→```rust
   214→pub trait CardRenderer {
   215→    fn render_section_header(&self, label: &str, count: usize) -> String;
   216→    fn render_card_row(&self, card: &CardView) -> String;
   217→    fn render_progress(&self, pct: u8, phase: Option<&str>, phase_frac: f32) -> String;
   218→    fn render_footer(&self, stats: &Stats) -> String;
   219→}
   220→```
   221→
   222→`CardView` is a flat view struct built from `Meta` + optional AC plan data
   223→(spec 027). The renderer does not read files — the caller assembles `CardView`.
   224→
   225→## vibe-kanban provider update
   226→
   227→Update `vibekanban/_bop_provider_impl.py` to pass additional fields in each
   228→task object so vibe-kanban's card face gets the same data:
   229→
   230→```python
   231→tasks.append({
   232→    "id":           ...,
   233→    "title":        ...,
   234→    "status":       ...,
   235→    "priority":     meta.get("priority", "P4"),
   236→    "provider":     meta.get("provider", ""),
   237→    "elapsed_s":    elapsed_seconds(meta),
   238→    "progress":     meta.get("progress"),
   239→    "ac_spec_id":   meta.get("ac_spec_id"),
   240→})
   241→```
   242→
   243→## Acceptance
   244→
   245→- `TermCaps::detect()` correctly classifies Dumb / Basic / Extended / Full / TrueColor
   246→- Terminal width re-queried on every render (not cached)
   247→- Level 3 section headers use `░▒▓ LABEL ▓▒░░░` fill to terminal width
   248→- Level 3 left-accent `▌` renders in state color
   249→- Level 4 two-column layout activates at width ≥ 100
   250→- Level 4 progress bar uses RGB gradient (amber→green)
   251→- All glyphs used are BMP (U+0000–U+FFFF); SMP card glyphs only if `glyph` field present and level ≥ Full
   252→- Graceful fallback: if detection fails, defaults to Extended
   253→- `make check` passes
   254→- `output/result.md` with ASCII screenshots of all four levels
   255→

entries.content:
Subtask 2-1 is complete. Here's what was done:

**DumbRenderer (Level 0)** — The implementation was already in place from phase 1-2. I added **36 comprehensive unit tests** covering:

- **Section headers** (5 tests): format `=== STATE (N) ===`, uppercasing, zero count, ASCII-only, no ANSI
- **Card row markers** (6 tests): `[>]` running, `[ ]` pending/drafts, `[x]` done/merged, `[!]` failed
- **Card row content** (9 tests): title display, provider, elapsed (short/long), progress, exit code visibility (shown on failed, hidden on done), full running card assembly
- **Progress bar** (6 tests): 0/50/100%, with phase name, ASCII-only, no ANSI
- **Footer** (5 tests): all stats, no optional stats, success rate only, ASCII-only, no ANSI  
- **Helpers** (2 tests): `format_duration` for seconds-only and minutes+seconds
- **Integration** (1 test): full `render_board` with Dumb caps producing ASCII-only, no-ANSI output

All 36 tests pass. Committed as `205233f`.

**Note for verification command**: The spec says `cargo test -p bop --lib render::dumb` but since `bop` is a binary crate (no `lib.rs`), the correct command is `cargo test -p bop --bin bop render::dumb`.
I'll start by reading the pattern files and understanding the existing code structure.

entries.content:
The subtask is complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

## BasicRenderer (Level 1) — Done ✅

**File modified:** `crates/bop-cli/src/render/basic.rs`

### Implementation
- **8-color ANSI state colors** via `state_color_8()`: pending→blue, running→yellow, done→green, failed→red, merged→magenta
- **Section headers**: `+-- RUNNING (2) --+` with BOLD + state color
- **Card rows**: `| [>] title  provider  elapsed  pct` with `|` left border and colored markers (`[>]`/`[x]`/`[!]`/`[ ]`)
- **Progress bars**: `|   [========  ] 67%` — ASCII `=` and spaces, left-bordered
- **Footer**: `+-- 14 total | 92% success | avg 3m44s --+` with DIM styling
- **Duration formatting**: `format_duration()` for `Xs` / `XmYYs` display

### Tests
**40 tests**, all passing — covering:
- Headers: format, uppercase, zero count, ANSI presence, box borders, per-state colors
- Card rows: all 6 state markers, left border, colored markers, title/provider/elapsed/progress/exit-code visibility
- Progress: format, 0%/100%, phase annotation, left border, ASCII-only
- Footer: all stats, partial stats, borders, ANSI presence, ASCII-only
- Duration formatting
- Full integration through `render_board`
I'll start by reading the pattern files and understanding the existing code structure, then implement the ExtendedRenderer.

1→use anyhow::Context;
     2→use std::fs;
     3→use std::path::Path;
     4→
     5→pub fn cmd_index(cards_root: &Path, print_flag: bool) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
     6→    // Resolve workspace root: parent of the .cards/ dir.
     7→    // cards_root may be a relative path like ".cards"; canonicalize first.
     8→    let cards_abs = cards_root
     9→        .canonicalize()
    10→        .unwrap_or_else(|_| cards_root.to_path_buf());
    11→    let repo_root_owned = cards_abs
    12→        .parent()
    13→        .map(|p| p.to_path_buf())
    14→        .unwrap_or_else(|| cards_abs.clone());
    15→    let repo_root = repo_root_owned.as_path();
    16→
    17→    let mut out = String::new();
    18→
    19→    // ── 1. Header ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    20→    out.push_str("# Codebase Index\n\n");
    21→    out.push_str("*Auto-generated by `bop index`. Read this before exploring files.*\n\n");
    22→
    23→    // ── 2. Top-level layout ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    24→    out.push_str("## Top-level layout\n\n");
    25→    let dir_descriptions: &[(&str, &str)] = &[
    26→        (
    27→            "crates/",
    28→            "Rust workspace members (bop-core lib + bop-cli binary)",
    29→        ),
    30→        (
    31→            ".cards/",
    32→            "Job card state machine — pending/ running/ done/ merged/ failed/",
    33→        ),
    34→        (
    35→            "adapters/",
    36→            "Shell adapter scripts: claude.nu, mock.nu, timeout_wrapper.nu",
    37→        ),
    38→        (
    39→            "scripts/",
    40→            "Helper scripts: policy_check.nu and other tooling",
    41→        ),
    42→        ("layouts/", "Zellij terminal layout files (bop.kdl)"),
    43→        (
    44→            "macos/",
    45→            "Xcode project for Quick Look extension (BopHost.app)",
    46→        ),
    47→        (
    48→            "vibekanban/",
    49→            "Zellij WASM plugin source for kanban pane display",
    50→        ),
    51→        ("completions/", "Shell completion scripts"),
    52→        (
    53→            "skills/",
    54→            "Claude skill definitions (markdown prompts for agents)",
    55→        ),
    56→        ("docs/", "Project documentation"),
    57→        ("research/", "Research notes and vendor snapshots"),
    58→        ("examples/", "Example bop templates and usage"),
    59→        ("launchd/", "macOS launchd service plists"),
    60→        ("zellij/", "Zellij config and plugin assets"),
    61→    ];
    62→    for (dir, desc) in dir_descriptions {
    63→        if repo_root.join(dir.trim_end_matches('/')).exists() {
    64→            out.push_str(&format!("- **`{dir}`** — {desc}\n"));
    65→        }
    66→    }
    67→    out.push('\n');
    68→
    69→    // ── 3. Key files ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    70→    out.push_str("## Key files\n\n");
    71→    let key_files: &[(&str, &str)] = &[
    72→        (
    73→            "Cargo.toml",
    74→            "Workspace manifest; lists crate members and shared dependencies",
    75→        ),
    76→        (

    78→            "Shortcuts: `make check` runs test + clippy + fmt",
    79→        ),

entries.content:
Subtask 3-1 is complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

## ExtendedRenderer (Level 2) — Implementation Summary

**File:** `crates/bop-cli/src/render/extended.rs`

### Features implemented:
1. **16-color ANSI** — Uses bright variants (90–97) for state colors: bright blue (pending), bright yellow (running), bright green (done), bright red (failed), bright magenta (merged)

2. **Single-line box drawing** — `┌─┐` header with width-adaptive `─` fill, `│` left border on progress bars, `└─┘` footer

3. **Left-accent stripe** — `▌` (U+258C) in state color on every card row

4. **Unicode markers** — `▶` (running), `✓` (done/merged), `✗` (failed), `·` (pending)

5. **16-cell progress bar** — `████████░░░░░░░░` using filled block (U+2588) and light shade (U+2591) with percentage

6. **Moon-quarter phase glyphs** — `◔` (<25%), `◑` (25–50%), `◕` (50–75%), `●` (≥75%) displayed with phase name

7. **Footer** — Stats separated by `│` box-drawing pipe, enclosed in `└─ ... ─┘`

### Test coverage: 44 tests passing
- 7 header tests (format, case, count, colors, box chars, width adaptation)
- 14 card row tests (accents, markers, content fields, ANSI)
- 7 progress bar tests (block chars, 16-cell count, edge cases, phase/moon)
- 4 moon glyph tests (all 4 quarter ranges)
- 5 footer tests (stats, separators, box chars, ANSI)
- 2 duration formatting tests
- 1 full-board integration test

entries.content:
Implementation complete. Here's a summary of what was built:

## FullRenderer (Level 3 — Demoscene Mode)

**Section headers:** Dithered fade pattern `░▒▓ RUNNING (2) ▓▒░░░░░...` filled to terminal width, colored with 256-color ANSI per state (amber=running, green=done, red=failed, blue=pending, violet=merged).

**Card rows:** Left-accent `▌` stripe in state color, Unicode markers (▶ running, ✓ done/merged, ✗ failed, · pending), **dice glyphs** ⚀⚁⚂⚃⚄⚅ encoding priority P1–P6, plus provider, elapsed time, progress %, and exit code for failed cards.

**Progress bar:** 16-cell bar using `█` (filled) and `░` (empty) with percentage, plus moon quarter glyph (◔◑◕●) and phase name when available.

**Footer:** Same dithered `░▒▓ ... ▓▒░` pattern with total/success rate/avg duration, using `│` pipe separators.

**Tests:** 55 unit tests covering demoscene header pattern, all 6 dice glyphs + edge cases, card row rendering, progress bar cells, moon glyphs, footer pattern, duration formatting, and full board integration.
I'll start by reading the pattern files and understanding the existing renderer implementations, then implement the TrueColorRenderer.

entries.content:
Done! Here's a summary of what was implemented:

## TrueColorRenderer (Level 4) — Complete

**File modified:** `crates/bop-cli/src/render/truecolor.rs`

### Key features implemented:

1. **24-bit RGB colors** — `\x1b[38;2;R;G;Bm` escape sequences for all state colors, matching hex values from `colors.rs` (pending=#3A5A8A, running=#B8690F, done=#1E8A45, failed=#C43030, merged=#6B3DB8)

2. **Double-line box drawing** — `╔═╗` section headers, `╚═╝` footers, `║` section side borders

1→# Terminal card renderer with progressive degradation
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→`bop status --watch` and `bop list` show cards as flat text rows. The goal is
     6→a rich, demoscene-inspired ANSI card layout that degrades gracefully across
     7→terminal capabilities — from a dumb SSH pipe to a full truecolor Zellij pane.
     8→vibe-kanban (already integrated via `vibekanban/`) showed that column-based
     9→card layouts are more scannable than flat lists; bop's CLI should match that
    10→quality natively without requiring a separate TUI process.
    11→
    12→## Capability detection
    13→
    14→Add `crates/bop-cli/src/termcaps.rs`:
    15→
    16→```rust
    17→#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord)]
    18→pub enum TermLevel {
    19→    Dumb,       // TERM=dumb or unset; no color, ASCII only
    20→    Basic,      // 8-color ANSI; ASCII borders
    21→    Extended,   // 16-color; box-drawing (single line); unicode blocks
    22→    Full,       // 256-color; block shading ░▒▓; full BMP unicode
    23→    TrueColor,  // 24-bit RGB; double-line box ╔═╗; playing-card tokens
    24→}
    25→
    26→pub struct TermCaps {
    27→    pub level: TermLevel,
    28→    pub width: u16,
    29→    pub two_column: bool,   // width >= 100
    30→}
    31→
    32→impl TermCaps {
    33→    pub fn detect() -> Self {
    34→        let level = Self::detect_level();
    35→        let width = terminal_size().map(|(w, _)| w.0).unwrap_or(80);
    36→        TermCaps { level, width, two_column: width >= 100 }
    37→    }
    38→
    39→    fn detect_level() -> TermLevel {
    40→        // Zellij always supports Full
    41→        if std::env::var("ZELLIJ").is_ok() {
    42→            return TermLevel::Full;
    43→        }
    44→        let colorterm = std::env::var("COLORTERM").unwrap_or_default();
    45→        if colorterm == "truecolor" || colorterm == "24bit" {
    46→            return TermLevel::TrueColor;
    47→        }
    48→        let term = std::env::var("TERM").unwrap_or_default();
    49→        if term.contains("256color") {
    50→            return TermLevel::Full;
    51→        }
    52→        if term.starts_with("xterm") || term.starts_with("screen")
    53→            || term.starts_with("tmux") || term.starts_with("rxvt") {
    54→            return TermLevel::Extended;
    55→        }
    56→        if term == "dumb" || term.is_empty() {
    57→            return TermLevel::Dumb;
    58→        }
    59→        TermLevel::Basic
    60→    }
    61→}
    62→```
    63→
    64→`terminal_size` crate (already in Rust ecosystem, MIT, ~2KB). Re-query on
    65→every render — never cache (supports `bop status --watch` resize handling,
    66→spec 025 requirement).
    67→
    68→## Card rendering — four layouts
    69→
    70→All layouts use the same data from `Meta` + optional `implementation_plan.json`
    71→(spec 027). The renderer selects the layout from `TermCaps.level`.
    72→
    73→---
    74→
    75→### Level 0 — Dumb (no color, ASCII only)
    76→
    77→```
    78→=== RUNNING (2) ===
    79→[>] my-feature     claude   2m14s  67%
    80→[>] bugfix-auth    codex    0m43s  22%
    81→
    82→--- PENDING (3) ---
    83→[ ] docs-update
    84→[ ] refactor-api
    85→[ ] add-tests

    87→--- DONE / FAILED ---

    89→[!] broken-card         exit 1
    90→
    91→14 total | 92% success | avg 3m44s
    92→```
    93→
    94→---
    95→
    96→### Level 1 — Basic (8-color, ASCII borders)

   103→```
   104→

   107→### Level 2 — Extended (16-color, single-line box drawing)
   108→
   109→Left-accent stripe `▌` (U+258C) per card row, state color:

   126→

   128→
   129→### Level 3 — Full (256-color, demoscene block headers)
   130→
   131→Section headers use the dithered fade pattern — classic BBS/ANSI art style:
   132→
   133→```
   134→░▒▓ ⚙ RUNNING (2) ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░

   141→
   142→░▒▓ · PENDING ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   143→
   144→  · docs-update
   145→  · refactor-api
   146→  · add-tests
   147→
   148→░▒▓ ✓ DONE · ✗ FAILED ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   149→
   150→  ✓ perf-improvements                              4m 02s
   151→  ✗ broken-card                 failed              exit 1
   152→
   153→░▒▓▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   154→  14 total · success rate 92% · avg 3m 44s
   155→```
   156→
   157→Section header construction:
   158→```
   159→░▒▓ {LABEL} ▓▒░{░ × (width - label_len - 6)}
   160→```
   161→
   162→Left-accent `▌` is printed in state color (amber=running, green=done,
   163→red=failed, blue=pending, dim=merged). The dice glyph `⚀⚁⚂⚃⚄⚅` encodes
   164→card priority (P1–P6), BMP-safe.
   165→
   166→Progress bar: 16-cell `████░░░░` (filled = `\u{2588}`, empty = `\u{2591}`).
   167→
   168→---
   169→
   170→### Level 4 — TrueColor (double-line box, column layout)
   171→
   172→At `width >= 100`, two-column layout. Below 100, single-column with double box:
   173→
   174→```
   175→╔═ ⚙ RUNNING (2) ═══════════════════╗  ╔═ · PENDING (3) ════════════════════╗
   176→║ ⚀ my-feature    claude   2m 14s  ║  ║  · docs-update                     ║
   177→║   ████████░░ 67%  Ph2  ◑         ║  ║  · refactor-api                    ║
   178→╠══════════════════════════════════╣  ║  · add-tests                       ║
   179→║ ⚁ bugfix-auth   codex    0m 43s  ║  ╚════════════════════════════════════╝
   180→║   ████░░░░░░ 22%  Ph1  ◔         ║
   181→╚══════════════════════════════════╝  ╔═ ✓ DONE · ✗ FAILED ════════════════╗
   182→                                      ║ ✓ perf-improvements     4m 02s     ║
   183→                                      ║ ✗ broken-card   failed   exit 1    ║
   184→                                      ╚════════════════════════════════════╝
   185→```
   186→
   187→Double-line box chars (all BMP):
   188→- `╔ ═ ╗ ║ ╠ ╣ ╚ ╝` — corners, horizontals, verticals, T-joints
   189→- `╭ ─ ╮ │ ╰ ╯` — rounded single-line for card separators within a box
   190→
   191→Progress bar at TrueColor uses RGB gradient fill — amber→green as percent
   192→rises — via `\x1b[38;2;R;G;Bm█\x1b[0m` per cell. Falls back to fixed amber
   193→block at Full/Extended.
   194→
   195→---
   196→
   197→## Implementation structure
   198→
   199→```
   200→crates/bop-cli/src/
   201→  termcaps.rs      — TermLevel detection, TermCaps struct
   202→  render/
   203→    mod.rs         — CardRenderer trait, dispatch by TermLevel
   204→    dumb.rs        — Level 0
   205→    basic.rs       — Level 1
   206→    extended.rs    — Level 2
   207→    full.rs        — Level 3 (demoscene headers)
   208→    truecolor.rs   — Level 4 (double box, RGB gradient)
   209→```
   210→
   211→`CardRenderer` trait:
   212→
   213→```rust
   214→pub trait CardRenderer {
   215→    fn render_section_header(&self, label: &str, count: usize) -> String;
   216→    fn render_card_row(&self, card: &CardView) -> String;
   217→    fn render_progress(&self, pct: u8, phase: Option<&str>, phase_frac: f32) -> String;
   218→    fn render_footer(&self, stats: &Stats) -> String;
   219→}
   220→```
   221→
   222→`CardView` is a flat view struct built from `Meta` + optional AC plan data
   223→(spec 027). The renderer does not read files — the caller assembles `CardView`.
   224→
   225→## vibe-kanban provider update
   226→
   227→Update `vibekanban/_bop_provider_impl.py` to pass additional fields in each
   228→task object so vibe-kanban's card face gets the same data:
   229→
   230→```python
   231→tasks.append({
   232→    "id":           ...,
   233→    "title":        ...,
   234→    "status":       ...,
   235→    "priority":     meta.get("priority", "P4"),
   236→    "provider":     meta.get("provider", ""),
   237→    "elapsed_s":    elapsed_seconds(meta),
   238→    "progress":     meta.get("progress"),
   239→    "ac_spec_id":   meta.get("ac_spec_id"),
   240→})
   241→```
   242→
   243→## Acceptance
   244→
   245→- `TermCaps::detect()` correctly classifies Dumb / Basic / Extended / Full / TrueColor
   246→- Terminal width re-queried on every render (not cached)
   247→- Level 3 section headers use `░▒▓ LABEL ▓▒░░░` fill to terminal width
   248→- Level 3 left-accent `▌` renders in state color
   249→- Level 4 two-column layout activates at width ≥ 100
   250→- Level 4 progress bar uses RGB gradient (amber→green)
   251→- All glyphs used are BMP (U+0000–U+FFFF); SMP card glyphs only if `glyph` field present and level ≥ Full
   252→- Graceful fallback: if detection fails, defaults to Extended
   253→- `make check` passes
   254→- `output/result.md` with ASCII screenshots of all four levels
   255→

<tool_use_error>String to replace not found in file.
String: /// Count how many lines will be printed by list_cards() for cursor positioning.
fn count_display_lines(root: &Path, state_filter: &str) -> anyhow::Result<usize> {
    let states = resolve_states(state_filter);
    let mut line_count = 0;

    for (i, state) in states.iter().enumerate() {
        // Count root-level state group lines
        line_count += count_state_group_lines(root, state)?;

        // Count team-* directories
        if let Ok(entries) = fs::read_dir(root) {
            let mut team_dirs: Vec<_> = entries
                .flatten()
                .filter(|e| {
                    let name = e.file_name();
                    let s = name.to_string_lossy();
                    e.path().is_dir() && s.starts_with("team-")
                })
                .collect();
            team_dirs.sort_by_key(|e| e.file_name());
            for entry in team_dirs {
                line_count += count_state_group_lines(&entry.path(), state)?;
            }
        }

        // Add separator between state groups (but not after the last one)
        if i < states.len() - 1 {
            line_count += 1; // separator line
        }
    }

    // Final separator and summary
    line_count += 1; // separator before summary
    line_count += 1; // summary line

    Ok(line_count)
}


/// Count lines for a single state group (header + cards + blank line).
fn count_state_group_lines(dir: &Path, state: &str) -> anyhow::Result<usize> {
    let state_dir = dir.join(state);
    if !state_dir.exists() {
        return Ok(0);
    }

    let mut card_count = 0;
    if let Ok(entries) = fs::read_dir(&state_dir) {
        for entry in entries.flatten() {
            let p = entry.path();
            if p.is_dir()
                && p.extension().is_some_and(|e| e == "bop" || e == "jobcard")
                && bop_core::read_meta(&p).is_ok()
            {
                card_count += 1;
            }
        }
    }

    if card_count == 0 {
        return Ok(0);
    }

    // header + cards + blank line
    Ok(1 + card_count + 1)
}

entries.content:
Subtask 4-1 is complete. Here's a summary of what was done:

## Changes Made to `crates/bop-cli/src/list.rs`

**Imports updated:**
- Removed `use crate::util;` (no longer needed)
- Added `use crate::render;` and `use crate::termcaps::TermCaps;`

**New helper functions added:**
- `collect_card_groups(root, state_filter)` → collects all cards into `(label, Vec<CardView>)` groups, handling both root-level and team-* directories
- `collect_card_views(dir, state)` → collects `CardView` structs from a single state directory using `render::from_meta()`
- `stats_to_render_stats(stats)` → converts `CardStats` to `render::Stats`

**`list_cards()` rewritten:**
- Now calls `TermCaps::detect()` → `collect_card_groups()` → `calculate_stats()` → `stats_to_render_stats()` → `render::render_board()` → prints output

**`list_cards_watch()` rewritten:**
- Both initial render and redraw blocks now use `TermCaps::detect()` (re-detected on every redraw, never cached)
- Line counting derived from `output.lines().count()` instead of separate `count_display_lines()` function (eliminates TOCTOU race)

**Removed:** `count_display_lines()` and `count_state_group_lines()` (obsolete)

**Retained:** `print_state_group()`, `print_summary()`, `format_duration()` with `#[allow(dead_code)]` annotations (used by existing tests)

**Verification:** All 26 list tests pass ✅

1→# Terminal card renderer with progressive degradation
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→`bop status --watch` and `bop list` show cards as flat text rows. The goal is
     6→a rich, demoscene-inspired ANSI card layout that degrades gracefully across
     7→terminal capabilities — from a dumb SSH pipe to a full truecolor Zellij pane.
     8→vibe-kanban (already integrated via `vibekanban/`) showed that column-based
     9→card layouts are more scannable than flat lists; bop's CLI should match that
    10→quality natively without requiring a separate TUI process.
    11→
    12→## Capability detection
    13→
    14→Add `crates/bop-cli/src/termcaps.rs`:
    15→
    16→```rust
    17→#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord)]
    18→pub enum TermLevel {
    19→    Dumb,       // TERM=dumb or unset; no color, ASCII only
    20→    Basic,      // 8-color ANSI; ASCII borders
    21→    Extended,   // 16-color; box-drawing (single line); unicode blocks
    22→    Full,       // 256-color; block shading ░▒▓; full BMP unicode
    23→    TrueColor,  // 24-bit RGB; double-line box ╔═╗; playing-card tokens
    24→}
    25→
    26→pub struct TermCaps {
    27→    pub level: TermLevel,
    28→    pub width: u16,
    29→    pub two_column: bool,   // width >= 100
    30→}
    31→
    32→impl TermCaps {
    33→    pub fn detect() -> Self {
    34→        let level = Self::detect_level();
    35→        let width = terminal_size().map(|(w, _)| w.0).unwrap_or(80);
    36→        TermCaps { level, width, two_column: width >= 100 }
    37→    }
    38→
    39→    fn detect_level() -> TermLevel {
    40→        // Zellij always supports Full
    41→        if std::env::var("ZELLIJ").is_ok() {
    42→            return TermLevel::Full;
    43→        }
    44→        let colorterm = std::env::var("COLORTERM").unwrap_or_default();
    45→        if colorterm == "truecolor" || colorterm == "24bit" {
    46→            return TermLevel::TrueColor;
    47→        }
    48→        let term = std::env::var("TERM").unwrap_or_default();
    49→        if term.contains("256color") {
    50→            return TermLevel::Full;
    51→        }
    52→        if term.starts_with("xterm") || term.starts_with("screen")
    53→            || term.starts_with("tmux") || term.starts_with("rxvt") {
    54→            return TermLevel::Extended;
    55→        }
    56→        if term == "dumb" || term.is_empty() {
    57→            return TermLevel::Dumb;
    58→        }
    59→        TermLevel::Basic
    60→    }
    61→}
    62→```
    63→
    64→`terminal_size` crate (already in Rust ecosystem, MIT, ~2KB). Re-query on
    65→every render — never cache (supports `bop status --watch` resize handling,
    66→spec 025 requirement).
    67→
    68→## Card rendering — four layouts
    69→
    70→All layouts use the same data from `Meta` + optional `implementation_plan.json`
    71→(spec 027). The renderer selects the layout from `TermCaps.level`.
    72→
    73→---
    74→
    75→### Level 0 — Dumb (no color, ASCII only)
    76→
    77→```
    78→=== RUNNING (2) ===
    79→[>] my-feature     claude   2m14s  67%
    80→[>] bugfix-auth    codex    0m43s  22%
    81→
    82→--- PENDING (3) ---
    83→[ ] docs-update
    84→[ ] refactor-api
    85→[ ] add-tests
    86→
    87→--- DONE / FAILED ---
    88→[x] perf-improvements   4m02s
    89→[!] broken-card         exit 1
    90→
    91→14 total | 92% success | avg 3m44s
    92→```
    93→
    94→---
    95→
    96→### Level 1 — Basic (8-color, ASCII borders)
    97→
    98→```
    99→+-- RUNNING (2) ------------------------------------------+
   100→| [>] my-feature     claude   2m14s  [========  ] 67%     |
   101→| [>] bugfix-auth    codex    0m43s  [===       ] 22%     |
   102→+---------------------------------------------------------+
   103→```
   104→
   105→---
   106→
   107→### Level 2 — Extended (16-color, single-line box drawing)
   108→
   109→Left-accent stripe `▌` (U+258C) per card row, state color:
   110→
   111→```
   112→┌─ ⚙ RUNNING ──────────────────────────────────────────┐
   113→│▌ my-feature          claude      2m 14s               │
   114→│  ████████████░░░░ 67%   Phase 2: Network  ◑           │
   115→│                                                        │
   116→│▌ bugfix-auth         codex       0m 43s               │
   117→│  ████░░░░░░░░░░ 22%   Phase 1: Core  ◔                │
   118→└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
   119→
   120→┌─ · PENDING ───────┐  ┌─ ✓ DONE · ✗ FAILED ───────────┐
   121→│  · docs-update    │  │  ✓ perf-improvements  4m 02s   │
   122→│  · refactor-api   │  │  ✗ broken-card  exit 1         │
   123→│  · add-tests      │  └────────────────────────────────┘
   124→└───────────────────┘
   125→```
   126→
   127→---
   128→
   129→### Level 3 — Full (256-color, demoscene block headers)
   130→
   131→Section headers use the dithered fade pattern — classic BBS/ANSI art style:
   132→
   133→```
   134→░▒▓ ⚙ RUNNING (2) ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   135→
   136→▌ ⚀ my-feature          claude      2m 14s
   137→▌   ████████████░░░░ 67%    Phase 2: Network layer   ◑
   138→
   139→▌ ⚁ bugfix-auth          codex       0m 43s
   140→▌   ████░░░░░░░░░░ 22%    Phase 1: Core impl         ◔
   141→
   142→░▒▓ · PENDING ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   143→
   144→  · docs-update
   145→  · refactor-api
   146→  · add-tests
   147→
   148→░▒▓ ✓ DONE · ✗ FAILED ▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   149→
   150→  ✓ perf-improvements                              4m 02s
   151→  ✗ broken-card                 failed              exit 1
   152→
   153→░▒▓▓▒░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
   154→  14 total · success rate 92% · avg 3m 44s
   155→```
   156→
   157→Section header construction:
   158→```
   159→░▒▓ {LABEL} ▓▒░{░ × (width - label_len - 6)}
   160→```
   161→
   162→Left-accent `▌` is printed in state color (amber=running, green=done,
   163→red=failed, blue=pending, dim=merged). The dice glyph `⚀⚁⚂⚃⚄⚅` encodes
   164→card priority (P1–P6), BMP-safe.
   165→
   166→Progress bar: 16-cell `████░░░░` (filled = `\u{2588}`, empty = `\u{2591}`).
   167→
   168→---
   169→
   170→### Level 4 — TrueColor (double-line box, column layout)
   171→
   172→At `width >= 100`, two-column layout. Below 100, single-column with double box:
   173→
   174→```
   175→╔═ ⚙ RUNNING (2) ═══════════════════╗  ╔═ · PENDING (3) ════════════════════╗
   176→║ ⚀ my-feature    claude   2m 14s  ║  ║  · docs-update                     ║
   177→║   ████████░░ 67%  Ph2  ◑         ║  ║  · refactor-api                    ║
   178→╠══════════════════════════════════╣  ║  · add-tests                       ║
   179→║ ⚁ bugfix-auth   codex    0m 43s  ║  ╚════════════════════════════════════╝
   180→║   ████░░░░░░ 22%  Ph1  ◔         ║
   181→╚══════════════════════════════════╝  ╔═ ✓ DONE · ✗ FAILED ════════════════╗
   182→                                      ║ ✓ perf-improvements     4m 02s     ║
   183→                                      ║ ✗ broken-card   failed   exit 1    ║
   184→                                      ╚════════════════════════════════════╝
   185→```
   186→
   187→Double-line box chars (all BMP):
   188→- `╔ ═ ╗ ║ ╠ ╣ ╚ ╝` — corners, horizontals, verticals, T-joints
   189→- `╭ ─ ╮ │ ╰ ╯` — rounded single-line for card separators within a box
   190→
   191→Progress bar at TrueColor uses RGB gradient fill — amber→green as percent
   192→rises — via `\x1b[38;2;R;G;Bm█\x1b[0m` per cell. Falls back to fixed amber
   193→block at Full/Extended.
   194→
   195→---
   196→
   197→## Implementation structure
   198→
   199→```
   200→crates/bop-cli/src/
   201→  termcaps.rs      — TermLevel detection, TermCaps struct
   202→  render/
   203→    mod.rs         — CardRenderer trait, dispatch by TermLevel
   204→    dumb.rs        — Level 0
   205→    basic.rs       — Level 1
   206→    extended.rs    — Level 2
   207→    full.rs        — Level 3 (demoscene headers)
   208→    truecolor.rs   — Level 4 (double box, RGB gradient)
   209→```
   210→
   211→`CardRenderer` trait:
   212→
   213→```rust
   214→pub trait CardRenderer {
   215→    fn render_section_header(&self, label: &str, count: usize) -> String;
   216→    fn render_card_row(&self, card: &CardView) -> String;
   217→    fn render_progress(&self, pct: u8, phase: Option<&str>, phase_frac: f32) -> String;
   218→    fn render_footer(&self, stats: &Stats) -> String;
   219→}
   220→```
   221→
   222→`CardView` is a flat view struct built from `Meta` + optional AC plan data
   223→(spec 027). The renderer does not read files — the caller assembles `CardView`.
   224→
   225→## vibe-kanban provider update
   226→
   227→Update `vibekanban/_bop_provider_impl.py` to pass additional fields in each
   228→task object so vibe-kanban's card face gets the same data:
   229→
   230→```python
   231→tasks.append({
   232→    "id":           ...,
   233→    "title":        ...,
   234→    "status":       ...,
   235→    "priority":     meta.get("priority", "P4"),
   236→    "provider":     meta.get("provider", ""),
   237→    "elapsed_s":    elapsed_seconds(meta),
   238→    "progress":     meta.get("progress"),
   239→    "ac_spec_id":   meta.get("ac_spec_id"),
   240→})
   241→```
   242→
   243→## Acceptance
   244→
   245→- `TermCaps::detect()` correctly classifies Dumb / Basic / Extended / Full / TrueColor
   246→- Terminal width re-queried on every render (not cached)
   247→- Level 3 section headers use `░▒▓ LABEL ▓▒░░░` fill to terminal width
   248→- Level 3 left-accent `▌` renders in state color
   249→- Level 4 two-column layout activates at width ≥ 100
   250→- Level 4 progress bar uses RGB gradient (amber→green)
   251→- All glyphs used are BMP (U+0000–U+FFFF); SMP card glyphs only if `glyph` field present and level ≥ Full
   252→- Graceful fallback: if detection fails, defaults to Extended
   253→- `make check` passes
   254→- `output/result.md` with ASCII screenshots of all four levels
   255→

1→#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2→"""JobCard provider implementation. Called by bop-provider.nu."""
     3→import json
     4→import os
     5→import sys
     6→import pathlib
     7→
     8→cards_dir = pathlib.Path(sys.argv[1])
     9→tasks = []
    10→
    11→state_map = {
    12→    "pending": "pending",
    13→    "running": "in_progress",
    14→    "done":    "review",
    15→    "merged":  "done",
    16→    "failed":  "blocked",
    17→}
    18→
    19→STATE_NAMES = set(state_map.keys())
    20→
    21→for entry in sorted(cards_dir.iterdir()):
    22→    if not entry.is_dir():
    23→        continue
    24→
    25→    if entry.name in STATE_NAMES:
    26→        # Flat layout: .cards/merged/card.bop/ (no team level)
    27→        state = entry.name
    28→        status = state_map[state]
    29→        for card_dir in sorted(entry.iterdir()):
    30→            if card_dir.suffix != ".bop":
    31→                continue
    32→            meta_file = card_dir / "meta.json"
    33→            if not meta_file.exists():
    34→                continue
    35→            try:
    36→                meta = json.loads(meta_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'))
    37→            except Exception:
    38→                continue
    39→            tasks.append({
    40→                "id":        meta.get("id", card_dir.stem),
    41→                "title":     meta.get("title", meta.get("id", card_dir.stem)),
    42→                "status":    status,
    43→                "team":      "root",
    44→                "stage":     meta.get("stage", ""),
    45→                "meta_path": str(meta_file),
    46→            })
    47→    else:
    48→        # Team layout: .cards/team-cli/pending/card.bop/
    49→        team = entry.name
    50→        for state, status in state_map.items():
    51→            state_dir = entry / state
    52→            if not state_dir.is_dir():
    53→                continue
    54→            for card_dir in sorted(state_dir.iterdir()):
    55→                if card_dir.suffix != ".bop":
    56→                    continue
    57→                meta_file = card_dir / "meta.json"
    58→                if not meta_file.exists():
    59→                    continue
    60→                try:
    61→                    meta = json.loads(meta_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'))
    62→                except Exception:
    63→                    continue
    64→                tasks.append({
    65→                    "id":        meta.get("id", card_dir.stem),
    66→                    "title":     meta.get("title", meta.get("id", card_dir.stem)),
    67→                    "status":    status,
    68→                    "team":      team,
    69→                    "stage":     meta.get("stage", ""),
    70→                    "meta_path": str(meta_file),
    71→                })
    72→
    73→print(json.dumps(tasks, indent=2))
    74→

1→#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2→"""JobCard provider implementation. Called by bop-provider.nu."""
     3→import json
     4→import os
     5→import sys
     6→import pathlib
     7→import time
     8→
     9→def elapsed_seconds(meta):
    10→    """Compute elapsed seconds from meta: duration_s if present, else started_at to now."""
    11→    if "duration_s" in meta:
    12→        try:
    13→            return float(meta["duration_s"])
    14→        except (TypeError, ValueError):
    15→            pass
    16→    started = meta.get("started_at")
    17→    if started:
    18→        try:
    19→            # ISO-8601 basic parse (Python 3.7+ fromisoformat)
    20→            from datetime import datetime, timezone
    21→            dt = datetime.fromisoformat(started.replace("Z", "+00:00"))
    22→            return round(time.time() - dt.timestamp(), 1)
    23→        except Exception:
    24→            pass
    25→    return None
    26→
    27→cards_dir = pathlib.Path(sys.argv[1])
    28→tasks = []
    29→
    30→state_map = {
    31→    "pending": "pending",
    32→    "running": "in_progress",
    33→    "done":    "review",
    34→    "merged":  "done",
    35→    "failed":  "blocked",
    36→}
    37→
    38→STATE_NAMES = set(state_map.keys())
    39→
    40→for entry in sorted(cards_dir.iterdir()):
    41→    if not entry.is_dir():
    42→        continue
    43→
    44→    if entry.name in STATE_NAMES:
    45→        # Flat layout: .cards/merged/card.bop/ (no team level)
    46→        state = entry.name
    47→        status = state_map[state]
    48→        for card_dir in sorted(entry.iterdir()):
    49→            if card_dir.suffix != ".bop":
    50→                continue
    51→            meta_file = card_dir / "meta.json"
    52→            if not meta_file.exists():
    53→                continue
    54→            try:
    55→                meta = json.loads(meta_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'))
    56→            except Exception:
    57→                continue
    58→            tasks.append({
    59→                "id":        meta.get("id", card_dir.stem),
    60→                "title":     meta.get("title", meta.get("id", card_dir.stem)),
    61→                "status":    status,
    62→                "team":      "root",
    63→                "stage":     meta.get("stage", ""),
    64→                "priority":  meta.get("priority", "P4"),
    65→                "provider":  meta.get("provider", ""),
    66→                "elapsed_s": elapsed_seconds(meta),
    67→                "progress":  meta.get("progress"),
    68→                "ac_spec_id": meta.get("ac_spec_id"),
    69→                "meta_path": str(meta_file),
    70→            })
    71→    else:
    72→        # Team layout: .cards/team-cli/pending/card.bop/
    73→        team = entry.name
    74→        for state, status in state_map.items():
    75→            state_dir = entry / state
    76→            if not state_dir.is_dir():
    77→                continue
    78→            for card_dir in sorted(state_dir.iterdir()):
    79→                if card_dir.suffix != ".bop":
    80→                    continue
    81→                meta_file = card_dir / "meta.json"
    82→                if not meta_file.exists():
    83→                    continue
    84→                try:
    85→                    meta = json.loads(meta_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'))
    86→                except Exception:
    87→                    continue
    88→                tasks.append({
    89→                    "id":        meta.get("id", card_dir.stem),
    90→                    "title":     meta.get("title", meta.get("id", card_dir.stem)),
    91→                    "status":    status,
    92→                    "team":      team,
    93→                    "stage":     meta.get("stage", ""),
    94→                    "priority":  meta.get("priority", "P4"),
    95→                    "provider":  meta.get("provider", ""),
    96→                    "elapsed_s": elapsed_seconds(meta),
    97→                    "progress":  meta.get("progress"),
    98→                    "ac_spec_id": meta.get("ac_spec_id"),
    99→                    "meta_path": str(meta_file),

I can also see it's correctly picking up a non-default priority value — `"priority": "normal"` for the watchpaths-test card.
